subcodes.first_line: O Zayn! We wish to make mention of thy son who hath ascended unto Us, attained unto Our horizon, and quaffed the choice wine of Our Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین انا نحب ان نذکر ابنک الذی صعد الینا و فاز بافقنا و شرب رحیق وحینا و
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
